## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content production, performance metrics, and industry page templates.](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is \~2/3 complete for the week, with more to be delivered today or Monday](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [New industry page template discussed; engineering team needs connector list and content sources for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Significant growth in sessions and impressions for cloud/hybrid architecture and security/privacy/compliance content](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [AI growth metrics show surprising increase in Claude usage; Airbyte outperforming competitors in targeted prompts](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [Published content approved earlier in the week](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [\~2/3 of weekly content complete, remainder expected today or Monday](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [New topics ready to start, more to be sent next week for review](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Planning to focus on granular industry-specific topics in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

### Industry Page Template Review

  - [Static quotes for social proof to be used from case studies](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Recommended connectors section to be populated based on industry relevance](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Content interlinking strategy: focus on how-to sync pages, tutorials, and lower-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Remove "Try Free" CTA, keep only "Talk to Sales" in the top navbar](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Case studies to be selected from success stories page, with potential A/B testing across industries](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Significant growth in sessions for cloud/hybrid architecture content (\>100% increase)](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Security, privacy, and compliance content also showing strong growth](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [AI growth metrics: Unexpected surge in Claude usage](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Scrunch data: Citations up 34%, positions up 46%, strong competitive presence](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

### Next Steps for Template Implementation

  - [Tanmay to share list of connectors for industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Carrie to provide guidance to engineering team on content sources and logic](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Kyle to grant Tanmay access to Scrunch for prompt tracking](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Potential on-site visit to San Francisco office discussed, no concrete plans yet](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Atlas access request in progress](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Reminder to avoid using "real-time" terminology in healthcare-related content](https://fathom.video/share/2DqyqZPFo6yyyrY5Z57DSiJmuc4LRsJG?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
